name: First 30 days
prompts: What's something you expected to be hard that turned out to be easy?
What's a tool whose name is unintuitive — and what would you rename it to?
Who was the first person who made you feel welcome here?
What's a meeting you sat through where you didn't understand half the acronyms? Which one?
What surprised you most in your first month?
What was your day-one impression that turned out to be wrong?
Which document do you wish someone had handed you on day one?
What's a small ritual the team has that you've come to like?
What would you tell yourself the night before you joined?
What part of the codebase did you click around for an hour before asking for help?
